dataset: SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust) daily OHLCV data

pi_items.source: Real market data file at examples/ninja_trader_env/data/SPY.Last.txt, NASDAQ listing, Yahoo Finance

pi_items.verified_value: HeikenAshi (internal method name; UI displays as 'Heiken Ashi' with space)
pi_items.source: NinjaTrader 8 official documentation: AddHeikenAshi() method (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpGuides/nt8/addheikenashi.htm), support article (https://support.ninjatrader.com/s/article/Understanding-Heiken-Ashi-Bars-NinjaTrader-Desktop)
NinjaTrader 8 official documentation: ADX indicator (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/average_directional_index_adx.htm), widely used technical indicator

Industry standard: Period 14 recommended by ADX creator J. Welles Wilder (https://chartschool.stockcharts.com/table-of-contents/technical-indicators-and-overlays/technical-indicators/average-directional-index-adx), confirmed in multiple sources (https://www.litefinance.org/blog/for-beginners/best-technical-indicators/adx-indicator-average-directional-index/, https://capital.com/average-directional-index)

NinjaTrader 8 official documentation: ParabolicSAR() method (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/parabolic_sar.htm), method signature shows ParabolicSAR(double acceleration, double accelerationMax, double accelerationStep)

Industry standard and NinjaTrader default: Parabolic SAR creator Wilder specified 0.02 as initial acceleration, confirmed across multiple sources (https://chartschool.stockcharts.com/table-of-contents/technical-indicators-and-overlays/technical-overlays/parabolic-sar, https://www.litefinance.org/blog/for-beginners/best-technical-indicators/parabolic-sar-indicator/)

Industry standard and NinjaTrader default: Maximum acceleration of 0.2 confirmed across multiple sources (https://chartschool.stockcharts.com/table-of-contents/technical-indicators-and-overlays/technical-overlays/parabolic-sar, https://www.litefinance.org/blog/for-beginners/best-technical-indicators/parabolic-sar-indicator/)

pi_items.verified_value: accelerationStep should be 0.02 according to NinjaTrader ParabolicSAR method signature
pi_items.source: NinjaTrader 8 official documentation: ParabolicSAR(double acceleration, double accelerationMax, double accelerationStep) - https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/parabolic_sar.htm

privileged_info_summary: SPY is a real ETF (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust) with authentic market data from 2023-2024 stored locally. The task configures NinjaTrader 8 with standard technical indicators: ADX with Period=14 (industry-standard default set by creator J. Welles Wilder), and Parabolic SAR with Acceleration=0.02, AccelerationMax=0.2 (standard parameters). Heiken Ashi bar type is supported natively in NinjaTrader 8. The Parabolic SAR parameter specification in metadata is incomplete; the full method requires three parameters (acceleration, accelerationMax, accelerationStep) but only two are specified.
